detrended_ttest.interpretation: Negative residual = fewer avalanches than F10.7-season model predicts

within_winter_meta.interpretation: Fixed-effects meta across winters absorbs solar cycle

epp_energy_input.note: Typical major geomagnetic storm hemispheric power

energy_ratio.interpretation: EPP provides ~4.3e-04 of the energy needed for SSW-scale warming
energy_ratio.conclusion: Direct EPP heating is insufficient (factor ~2324 too small). Mechanism must be catalytic (NOx->O3->radiative) not direct heating.

catalytic_amplification.interpretation: Catalytic NOx->O3->radiative pathway amplifies EPP energy by ~7500x

forbush_pathway.note: Svensmark mechanism. Controversial but timescale matches 1-3d lag.
